issues_found.critical: Missing detailed metrics and comparisons against baseline models, limiting evaluation strength.
Lack of statistical significance testing raises concerns about reliability of reported accuracy improvements.
Specific implementation details (hyperparameters, algorithms in decision trees/clustering) are not discussed, hindering reproducibility.

issues_found.minor: Paper does not specify exact metrics used for evaluation or provide confidence intervals/p-values, affecting validity of claims.
Code availability is not mentioned in abstract, which is essential for reproducibility.
